name: Jeb Bush
subject: Hillary Announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

Moments ago Hillary Clinton officially announced her White House bid - and it's up to us to stop her.

I'm going to be straightforward with you, this isn't going to be easy. **Hillary plans to raise $1.7 billion to win the White House and she already has 135,000 donors at the ready.**

[**But I wouldn 't be asking if I didn't know you were up for it, which is why I'm asking you to give $5 right now to stop her.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1660:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Every dollar you give goes directly to fighting her Liberal agenda and ensuring we don't suffer another 4 years of Democrat control.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1661:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

8 years of Democrat control has already done untold damage, 4 more years of Clinton control will only make it worse.

[**To do this, we 'll need you to step up like never before, and right now I need you to give $5 to show you're ready to defeat Hillary in 2016.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1662:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

This is going to be a long fight, but together, we will stop her.

Thank you for your help, you'll be hearing from me again soon.

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1663:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=162&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Hillary for America
subject: Welcome aboard, and thank you. Now take the next step:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible
body:
---
[](https://www.hillaryclinton.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gw&utm_campaign=main_signup "Hillary for America")
| Hi there-- Thanks for signing up to be a part of Hillary for America. This campaign will be what supporters like you make of it -- by getting involved now, you'll help shape it from the very beginning. There are a few things you can do immediately to take the next step:
1. Make sure your friends and family know you're on board. Invite them to become a part of this too. [HillaryClinton.com/invite-your-friends](https://www.HillaryClinton.com/invite-your-friends)
2. Donate! Your donation will help put organizers in the field and give this campaign the resources it needs to get off to a strong start in these crucial first months.
3. Sign up to become a volunteer in your community. You'll be the first to know how you can help organize where you live. [HillaryClinton.com/invite-your-friends-to-volunteer](https://www.HillaryClinton.com/invite-your-friends-to-volunteer)

Thanks again for joining the team. We're just getting started. Hillary for America |
| Paid for by Hillary for America Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 |

name: Our American Revival
subject: We can stop her liberal policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI0NjcwNDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMjU5MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) Peter,
_**
What have been the consequences of the liberal Hillary Clinton agenda?**_

Her record as Secretary of State proved that Hillary Clinton's policy agenda for America was and still is an unmitigated **disaster**. From the failed Russian reset, to a nearly nuclear armed Iran, and our relations with Israel deteriorating to historic levels, Hillary Clinton's tenure as Secretary of State resulted in an America that is less safe and less trusted abroad. To top all of that off, she presided over numerous scandals, hid her emails, and has been less than forthright with the American people.

**We must stand together and speak out against Hillary Clinton 's liberal policies.** [Show your support for our conservative alternative to Hillary's dangerous liberal agenda by making a contribution today. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI0NjcwNDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMjU5MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Our American Revival is fighting every day to return power to the American people. We believe that for far too long, Washington has tried to control too much of our lives. A government closest to the people is the most responsive and accountable to the people. This is the vision of our founders, but Hillary's record over the last four decades clearly shows that it is not her vision. **We need you to stand with us and make your voice heard in opposition to her dangerous policy agenda.**
[**CONTRIBUTE NOW >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI0NjcwNDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMjU5MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)Thanks,

Our American Revival

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI0NjcwNDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMjU5MzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
